name: Coniglio Alla Molisana Stewed Rabbit with Sausages
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully bone the rabbit, keeping the pieces of meat as large as possible.
2. Wipe the rabbit meat with a damp cloth and cut it into 12 even-sized pieces.
3. Flatten the pieces lightly and season with salt, pepper, finely chopped parsley,
and rosemary.
4. Place a slice of ham on each piece of rabbit.
5. Roll up the seasoned rabbit tightly.
6. Thread one roll of rabbit, one sage leaf, one sausage, another roll of
rabbit, and another sage leaf onto each skewer.
7. Brush the skewers with olive oil.
8. Grill the skewers over charcoal or on a rack close to the heat source,
turning occasionally and brushing with oil each time.
9. Alternatively, bake the skewers in a slow oven at 350°F for one hour,
turning occasionally and brushing with oil.
